description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set on a landscaped plot with a mix of mature and young trees. The structure features a flat roof with a central glass skylight and rooftop amenities, including a terrace and solar panels. The facade is composed of light gray stone or concrete panels, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and several balconies and patios. The front yard is landscaped with flowering trees and a stone walkway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a covered porch. The rear of the house includes a shaded patio area and a small garden or play area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings featuring trees and gardens. The design highlights clean lines, open terraces, and a prominent glass skylight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, stone walkway, and flowering trees in the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view revealing balconies, rooftop terrace, and a mix of mature and young trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a shaded patio, small garden/play area, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible rooftop features, additional balconies, and a side patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large floor-to-ceiling windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wide steps, and a modern door flanked by large windows and decorative landscaping.
